title: The Preference Shares (Regulation of Dividends) Act, 1960
full_text: The Preference Shares (Regulation of Dividends) Act, 1960 अधिमानी शेयर (लाभांशों का विनियमन) अधिनियम, 1960 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196063 Act Number: 63 Enactment Date: 1960-12-28 Act Year: 1960 Short Title: The Preference Shares (Regulation of Dividends) Act, 1960 Hindi Title: अधिमानी शेयर (लाभांशों का विनियमन) अधिनियम, 1960 Long Title: An Act to regulate dividends on preference shares of certain companies. Ministry: Ministry of Corporate Affairs Enforcement Date: 28-12-1960 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Preference Shares (Regulation of Dividends) Act, 1960 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Regulation of dividends on preference shares in certain cases. Section 4. Special provisions in relation to companies where a portion of their income is not chargeable to income-tax. Section 4A. Deduction of income-tax. Section 5. Over-riding effect of Act. Section 6. Act not to apply to participating preference dividends. Section 7. Power to make rules. Schedule 1.
